params.prompt:
Instagram feed post for Nordic Barber Shop, vertical canvas close to 4:5, ink-black (#101010) background. Full-color (NOT grayscale/duotone) photograph as the main scene: inside a moody upscale barbershop lounge, a large flat-screen TV mounted on the wall broadcasting a live soccer match, warm gold key-light rim lighting the barber chairs, a couple of clients and a barber casually watching and laughing, one wearing a red jersey (Spain-coded) and another in a dark green jersey (Portugal-coded) — no real team crests, badges, sponsor logos or broadcast graphics, just color-coded jerseys. Full saturated color photography, cinematic but warm.

Graphic overlay on top, following the brand social-post-frame template exactly:
- Top-left: a solid Nordic Yellow (#FFD200) pill/eyebrow tag with small bold uppercase Fira Sans Condensed text reading "HOY EN NORDIC"
- Center-lower third: one bold display headline set in the exact hand-cut marker letterform style shown in the attached "Lost in South" character-map reference image, all uppercase, tight line-height, reading "ESPAÑA - PORTUGAL A LA 1PM" in bone-white (#F7F4EC), with the word "1PM" recolored in Nordic Yellow (#FFD200) as the single highlight word — no other yellow text.
- Small caption line below the headline in Fira Sans Condensed regular, bone-white at reduced opacity, reading "Pantalla grande, buen ambiente y bebida cortesía. Ven a verlo con nosotros."
- Bottom corner: small watermark of the exact logo shown in the attached logo reference image (white Viking-helmet mark + NORDIC / Barber Shop wordmark on transparent/ink background) — reproduce it faithfully, do not redesign it.

Keep the yellow accent to roughly 10-15% of the frame (pill + one highlight word only). Do not add any other colors to the graphic overlay itself — only the background photograph is in full color.
